title: Closeout: Hidden Dimming Threshold drainable-buffer curation complete
body: Claim 675daaf4-8836-4af9-8d1a-08e60b0033ba closed. Fitness is SOFT with zero hard/critical and ten live drainable buffers ready-empty. Source windows archived; fresh testing/tooling signals routed to docs/testing-tdd-recipes and frictions register F-34. Heartbeat loop stopped.
